div.head: The Secretary of State to the American Representative in Albania (Jacobs)
div.p:
100. Athens’ 1119 Oct 3 sent to Dept and repeated to Tirana for information. Reference is made to Greek FonOff note regarding Greek hostages allegedly held in Albanian concentration camp at Lesh. Dept would like you to report in this connection any further information
which may have come to your attention since your last report (your despatch 87 Sep 7Not printed.) and any pertinent evidence which you may be able to obtain by investigation or through trustworthy sources without embarrassing Mission in any way.In his telegram 218, December 7, 1945, 4 p.m., Mr. Jacobs reported: “Deptel 100, October 17, 3 p.m. Unable obtain additional information concerning Greek hostages allegedly held Albanian concentration camp but will continue efforts. Repeated to Athens as 7.” (760H.68/12–745)
Sent to Tirana; repeated to Athens.
